sample_translations.english: On the concluding program of snakes-yagna conducted by Janamejaya, Vaisampayana narrates Mahabharat to the sages and saints gathered there.

sample_translations.english: The opposition even from within the Government continues , though , to be strenuous , and rumour has it that if a sale goes through it is generally because it has the prime minister 's personal backing .
sample_translations.reference: हालंकि , विरोध तो सरकार के अंदर से भी जारी है और यह काम भी दुष्कर है पर बताते हैं कि प्रधानमंत्री के निजी समर्थन के चलते ही सौदे हो पा रहे हैं .
